label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The user is asking if following these instructions will return to the starting point. The instructions are: always face forward, take 2 steps right, 4 steps right, then 6 steps left. The options are Yes or No. First, I need to visualize or model the path. Since the person is always facing forward, their direction doesn't change unless they turn. But the instructions only mention steps to the right and left. So, "right" and "left" would be relative to the direction they're facing, which is forward. Wait, but if you're facing forward, moving right or left is sideways. So, if you're moving forward, taking steps to the right or left would be lateral movement, not changing the forward direction. Wait, maybe I should model this as a coordinate system.
